items.name: auto-stage-on-write
items.description: Automatically git-stages files after Claude writes or edits them

items.name: block-dangerous-commands
items.description: Blocks destructive shell commands (rm -rf, git push --force, etc.)

items.name: telegram-notify
items.description: Sends Telegram notification on task completion or errors

items.name: session-summary
items.description: Generates a session summary when Claude Code exits

items.name: codepulse-ingest
items.description: Sends tool execution telemetry to CodePulse dashboard
